all.en: This document summarizes your quarterly investment portfolio review.
all.zh: 本文件整理您本季投資組合檢視結果。

all.en: Your portfolio value at quarter end was eight hundred sixty thousand dollars.
all.zh: 您於季底之組合價值為八十六萬美元。

all.en: This represents a four percent increase over the previous quarter.
all.zh: 較上季成長百分之四。

all.en: Year to date performance currently stands at seven point two percent.
all.zh: 本年度迄今績效為百分之七點二。

all.en: Your portfolio remains aligned with the moderate growth profile.
all.zh: 您的組合仍與穩健成長型風險屬性一致。

all.en: Equity holdings make up roughly sixty percent of total assets.
all.zh: 股票部位約占總資產百分之六十。

all.en: Fixed income holdings account for thirty percent of allocation.
all.zh: 固定收益部位占配置百分之三十。

all.en: The remaining ten percent is held in cash and money market funds.
all.zh: 其餘百分之十持有現金與貨幣市場基金。

all.en: Domestic equity exposure outperformed international peers this quarter.
all.zh: 本季國內股票表現優於國際同類資產。

all.en: Technology and healthcare sectors led the strongest quarterly returns.
all.zh: 科技與醫療類股本季帶動最佳報酬。

all.en: Energy holdings lagged due to softer commodity prices.
all.zh: 能源持股因商品價格疲軟而落後。

all.en: The bond portfolio benefited from a slight decline in interest rates.
all.zh: 債券組合受惠於利率小幅下滑。

all.en: Duration risk remains modest relative to your risk tolerance.
all.zh: 相對於您的風險承受度，存續期風險仍屬適度。

all.en: We recommend a small rebalancing trade to restore target weights.
all.zh: 建議執行小幅再平衡交易以回復目標權重。

all.en: Tax loss harvesting opportunities have been identified for review.
all.zh: 已辨識可供檢視之稅損實現機會。

all.en: Required minimum distributions will apply starting next calendar year.
all.zh: 強制最低提領將自下年度起適用。

all.en: Beneficiary designations should be reviewed at least annually.
all.zh: 受益人指定應至少每年檢視一次。

all.en: Estate planning documents on file appear to remain current.
all.zh: 本行存檔之遺產規劃文件目前似仍有效。

all.en: Please confirm any major life changes that affect financial plans.
all.zh: 請告知任何影響財務規劃之重大生活變動。

all.en: Your next portfolio review is scheduled for early August.
all.zh: 您下次組合檢視排定於八月初。

all.en: We will send an agenda one week before the meeting date.
all.zh: 我們將於會議前一週寄發議程。

all.en: Thank you for your continued trust in our advisory services.
all.zh: 感謝您持續信任本公司之顧問服務。

all.en: Emerging market allocations remain modest pending greater geopolitical clarity ahead.
all.zh: 在地緣政治情勢明朗之前，新興市場配置維持適度水準。

all.en: Dividend yields on the core equity sleeve averaged just over two percent.
all.zh: 核心股票部位之股利殖利率平均略高於百分之二。

all.en: Alternative investments such as private credit may complement traditional fixed income holdings.
all.zh: 私募信用等另類投資可作為傳統固定收益部位之補充。

all.en: Retirement income projections show on track progress toward your stated goals.
all.zh: 退休所得試算顯示朝您既定目標穩健前進。

all.en: Education savings accounts for grandchildren have grown substantially this quarter.
all.zh: 為孫輩設立之教育儲蓄帳戶本季顯著成長。

all.en: Charitable giving strategies can deliver meaningful tax benefits before year end.
all.zh: 慈善捐贈策略可於年底前帶來顯著節稅效益。

all.en: Our research team maintains a neutral outlook on developed market equities.
all.zh: 本公司研究團隊對已開發市場股票維持中立看法。

all.en: Cybersecurity protections on your accounts were reviewed and confirmed up to date.
all.zh: 您帳戶之資安防護已檢視並確認為最新狀態。

all.en: Quarterly fee statements are available through the secure client portal anytime.
all.zh: 季度費用明細可透過安全客戶平台隨時查閱。

all.en: Please reach out should you wish to schedule an interim discussion soon.
all.zh: 如希望儘早安排期中會議，歡迎隨時聯繫我們。

all.en: Sector rotation strategies are reviewed monthly based on prevailing economic indicators.
all.zh: 類股輪動策略每月依當前經濟指標進行檢視。

all.en: Concentration limits prevent any single position from exceeding five percent of total holdings.
all.zh: 集中度上限防止任一單一部位超過總持有之百分之五。

all.en: Tax efficient fund placements optimize after tax returns across taxable and retirement accounts.
all.zh: 稅務效率基金配置可最佳化應稅與退休帳戶之稅後報酬。

all.en: Currency hedging on international positions is reviewed in response to forecast volatility.
all.zh: 國際部位之匯率避險依預期波動進行檢視。

all.en: Dollar cost averaging strategies remain active through scheduled monthly contributions.
all.zh: 定期定額策略透過每月排定之投入持續執行。

all.en: Liquidity reserves maintain three to six months of household expenses at all times.
all.zh: 流動性準備金隨時維持三至六個月之家庭支出水準。

all.en: Risk profiling questionnaires are updated whenever life circumstances change significantly.
all.zh: 風險屬性問卷於生活狀況發生重大變化時即予更新。

all.en: Trust and estate planning conversations include both legal and tax considerations carefully.
all.zh: 信託與遺產規劃討論審慎涵蓋法律與稅務考量。

all.en: Annual investment policy statements document objectives, constraints, and asset allocation targets.
all.zh: 年度投資政策說明書載明目標、限制與資產配置目標。

all.en: Thank you for the opportunity to serve as your trusted financial advisor.
all.zh: 感謝您讓我們有機會擔任您信賴的財務顧問。

all.en: Honestly, watching my retirement number grow each quarter feels more rewarding than any quick trade ever did.
all.zh: 老實說看著退休帳戶數字每季增加，比任何短線交易帶來的成就感都實在。

all.en: My advisor called me on my birthday last year, which is honestly a small thing but it meant a lot.
all.zh: 去年我生日當天我的顧問還打電話來，雖然是小事但讓我很感動。

all.en: Don't panic when the market dips, just trust the rebalancing plan that you set up at the start of the year.
all.zh: 市場下跌時別慌，相信年初設定的再平衡計畫就好。

all.en: I started a tiny dollar cost averaging plan for my niece's college fund five years ago and it grew nicely.
all.zh: 五年前我為姪女的大學基金開始小額定期定額，現在累積得很不錯。

all.en: Honestly, learning the difference between traditional and Roth accounts took me longer than I'd like to admit.
all.zh: 老實說搞懂傳統帳戶跟羅斯帳戶的差別，花的時間比我願意承認的久。

all.en: Be sure to update your beneficiary designations right after any major life event, not months later.
all.zh: 重大人生事件後立刻更新受益人指定，別拖到好幾個月後。

all.en: My friend lost a few percent by panic selling in the spring, while I just held tight and recovered nicely.
all.zh: 我朋友春天時恐慌賣出虧了幾個百分點，而我就抱著沒動，後來反而漲回來。

all.en: Don't be embarrassed to ask your advisor to repeat themselves, financial jargon really can be exhausting.
all.zh: 別不好意思請顧問再講一次，金融術語真的會讓人疲乏。

all.en: I love that the secure portal lets me check my balance at midnight when I can't sleep before a big meeting.
all.zh: 我超愛安全平台能讓我在重大會議前失眠的半夜查餘額。

all.en: Honestly, charitable giving feels even better when my advisor shows me how it also cuts my year end tax bill.
all.zh: 老實說顧問跟我說明慈善捐款還能降低年底稅金時，做善事的感覺就更好了。
